'''zajuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:reacter|reacter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:reacter|reacter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zajuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæjijith|zæjijith]] || [[word:zæjijij|zæjijij]] || [[word:zæjijish|zæjijish]] || [[word:zæjiji|zæjiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zajujujuth|zajujujuth]] || [[word:zajujujuj|zajujujuj]] || [[word:zajujujush|zajujujush]] || [[word:zajujuju|zajujuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zajujuth|zajujuth]] || [[word:zajujuj|zajujuj]] || [[word:zajujush|zajujush]] || [[word:zajuju|zajuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zajufjuth|zajufjuth]] || [[word:zajufjuj|zajufjuj]] || [[word:zajufjush|zajufjush]] || [[word:zajufjuf|zajufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zajujuthu|zajujuthu]] || [[word:zajujuju|zajujuju]] || [[word:zajujushu|zajujushu]] || [[word:zajujuku|zajujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zajujuth|zajujuth]] || [[word:zajujuj|zajujuj]] || [[word:zajujush|zajujush]] || [[word:zajuju|zajuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zajujuthul|zajujuthul]] || [[word:zajujujul|zajujujul]] || [[word:zajujushul|zajujushul]] || [[word:zajujukul|zajujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zajujuthuthu|zajujuthuthu]] || [[word:zajujujuju|zajujujuju]] || [[word:zajujushushu|zajujushushu]] || [[word:zajujuku|zajujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zajujuthun|zajujuthun]] || [[word:zajujujun|zajujujun]] || [[word:zajujushun|zajujushun]] || [[word:zajujukun|zajujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zajujuthuoro|zajujuthuoro]] || [[word:zajujujuoro|zajujujuoro]] || [[word:zajujushuoro|zajujushuoro]] || [[word:zajujukuoro|zajujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
